properties.displayName: Audit or deny API Management with public network access enabled
properties.description: Guardrail that flags (Audit) or blocks (Deny) API Management instances whose publicNetworkAccess is not 'Disabled'. Evaluation of the alias works even though it is not Modifiable, so Deny/Audit are valid; only the Modify EFFECT is impossible. Deny cannot itself remediate - pair it with the DeployIfNotExists policy or IaC. NOTE: Deny on create is of limited use here because publicNetworkAccess cannot be set at create time anyway (it is always Enabled on a fresh instance); use this mainly to Audit drift or Deny updates that re-enable public access.
